ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "workerid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the worker */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the worker */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the worker */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the worker */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the worker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the worker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the worker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "hitid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each HIT (Human Intelligence Task) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the experiment */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward for completing the experiment */,
  "creationtime" TEXT /* Creation time of the experiment record */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in minutes */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment (e.g., image labeling) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignmentid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "hitid" TEXT /* Reference to the HIT associated with the assignment */,
  "workerid" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned to the task */,
  "assignmentstatus" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  "assignmentaccepttime" TEXT /* Time when the assignment was accepted */,
  "assignmentapprovaltime" TEXT /* Time when the assignment was approved */,
  "assignmentrejecttime" TEXT /* Time when the assignment was rejected */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided for the assignment */,
  "worker_output" TEXT /* Output provided by the worker for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignmentid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_hitid FOREIGN KEY ("hitid") REFERENCES experiments ("hitid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_workerid FOREIGN KEY ("workerid") REFERENCES workers ("workerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "responseid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "assignmentid" TEXT /* ID of the assignment related to the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* The response provided by the worker */,
  "label" TEXT /* The label corresponding to the response */,
  "enjoyment" INTEGER /* Enjoyment rating from the worker */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language used in the experiment */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the worker's response (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("responseid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_assignmentid FOREIGN KEY ("assignmentid") REFERENCES assignments ("assignmentid")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info" (
  "deviceid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the device information */,
  "workerid" INTEGER /* Reference to the worker using the device */,
  "OS" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "screenH" INTEGER /* Screen height of the device */,
  "screenW" INTEGER /* Screen width of the device */,
  "Browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the experiment */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deviceid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_info_workerid FOREIGN KEY ("workerid") REFERENCES workers ("workerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedbackid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback */,
  "workerid" INTEGER /* ID of the worker providing feedback */,
  "hitid" TEXT /* ID of the HIT related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the worker regarding the experiment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the worker (1-5) */,
  "is_helpful" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is helpful (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedbackid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_hitid FOREIGN KEY ("hitid") REFERENCES experiments ("hitid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_workerid FOREIGN KEY ("workerid") REFERENCES workers ("workerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "hit_status" (
  "hitid" TEXT /* ID of the HIT */,
  "hitstatus" TEXT /* Current status of the HIT (e.g., Reviewable) */,
  "reviewstatus" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., NotReviewed) */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Time when the HIT expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_timing" (
  "assignmentid" TEXT /* ID of the assignment */,
  "assignmentduration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assignment in seconds */,
  "autoapprovaldelay" INTEGER /* Auto-approval delay for the assignment */,
  "hitlifetime" INTEGER /* Lifetime of the HIT in seconds */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for completing the assignment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the assignment was started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignmentid")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_performance" (
  "workerid" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "average_accuracy" REAL /* Average accuracy of the worker */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the worker */,
  "total_assignments_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of assignments completed by the worker */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment 补充" (
  "hitid" TEXT /* ID of the HIT */,
  "supplementary_data" TEXT /* Supplementary data related to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hitid")
)
